key.name: enable-general-timeout
key.description: Apply the general timeout to clipboard content not detected as coming from a configured sensitive source.

key.name: enable-sensitive-sources
key.description: Use the focused application's WM_CLASS or app ID as a best-effort hint when deciding whether to apply the shorter timeout to configured sensitive sources.

key.name: detect-window-mode
key.summary: Capture the next focused window identifier
key.description: When enabled, Clipboard Decay captures the next focused window WM_CLASS or app ID and stores it for the preferences dialog.

key.name: detected-window-id
key.description: The most recently captured focused window WM_CLASS or app ID, used to help populate the manual sensitive-app fallback.

key.name: sensitive-timeout
key.description: Seconds before clearing clipboard content detected as coming from a configured sensitive source.

key.name: general-timeout
key.description: Seconds before clearing clipboard content from all other sources.

key.name: sensitive-sources
key.description: WM_CLASS names or app IDs (without any trailing .desktop suffix) treated as sensitive sources. Matching is case-insensitive.
